description: RSW Santa and The Nutcracker Mug great addition to any christmas collection. Made from AB grade stoneware mmaterial and featuring two assorted santa and the nutcracker designs. Perfect as a gift or stocking filler. The set arrives perfectly presented in a luxurious gift box. Ideal for gifting on different occasions such as birthdays and so on. Available in 11 oz capacity. It measures 8.2 cm diameter and 9.5 cm size.
